meta.homeDescription: We create audiovisual content with artificial intelligence. Creative production, 3D, motion graphics and advanced post-production.
meta.projectsDescription: Explore our portfolio of AI-powered audiovisual projects.
meta.servicesDescription: Creative production, animation, 3D, motion graphics, post-production and more with AI.
meta.blogDescription: News, trends and updates from the AI audiovisual world.
meta.contactDescription: Get in touch with YUTRO. Tell us about your project.

login.title: Sign in
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.

dashboard.welcome: Welcome to your AI avatar studio
dashboard.empty: You don't have any avatars yet.

history.title: History
history.empty: You don't have any generations yet.

banner.description: Create photorealistic avatars with AI. Generate characters, dress them and get complete photo sessions in minutes.

hub.title: Yutro Studio
hub.subtitle: Create, manage and select digital talent. Your personal studio and Yutro's curated roster, in one place.

avatars.title: My Avatars
avatars.description: Generate photorealistic AI avatars. Your personal library of digital talent, managed with your credits.

library.title: Talent Library
library.description: Access the studio's curated roster. Professional talent, ready to license for your campaign.

hub.noTalentAccessNote: Talent Library is an invite-only program. If your campaign requires curated studio talent, reach out to your Yutro contact.

placeholders.catalog: The catalog ships next sprint. Here you'll see the talents available for your project, filters by gender/age/category, and a live count of your casting.
placeholders.detail: The detail view ships next sprint. Here you'll see the full talent profile, studio and lifestyle galleries, and the action to add them to your casting.
placeholders.casting: The confirmation screen ships next sprint. Here you'll review your selection, mark exclusives and confirm license terms.

common.rightClickBlocked: Images are property of Yutro Estudio.

catalog.title: Casting {projectName}
catalog.subtitle: Catalog filtered for your project. Showing only talents available for {category} campaigns during your campaign window.
catalog.subtitleNoCategory: Catalog filtered for your project. Showing only talents available for the campaign window.

toast.fullCapacity: Slots full. Your project includes {max} talents.
toast.exclusiveFull: Your project allows up to {max} exclusive talents.

catalog.noResults: No talents match the current filters.

casting.subtitle: Final step · Licensing confirmation
casting.title: Your casting
casting.intro: Review the selected talents and define license terms. Mark individually which ones require exclusivity for your campaign. The studio will confirm availability and send a tailored quote within 24 business hours.

empty.title: Your casting is empty
empty.description: Go back to the catalog and add talents that match your campaign.

license.title: License terms
license.helpCategory: Mark below which talents need exclusive lock for the {category} category.
license.helpNone: No exclusivity: talents stay free for simultaneous use in other campaigns.
license.helpTotal: Total exclusivity: marked talents are fully locked from the market for the agreed duration.

toast.submitSuccess: ✓ Selection confirmed. {selected} talents · {exclusive} exclusive. — Yutro Estudio
toast.submitError: Something went wrong sending your selection. Try again in a moment.
toast.exclusiveFull: Your project allows up to {max} exclusive talents.
toast.needAtLeastOne: Add at least one talent before confirming.

submitted.title: ✓ Received
submitted.body: The studio will get back to you within 24 business hours.

confirm.title: Confirm your selection?
confirm.body: You're about to send your casting to the studio. Review the details before confirming.
confirm.irreversible: This action is final. Once submitted, the studio receives your selection by email and starts coordinating.

nda.title: Confidentiality Agreement
nda.subtitle: Before accessing the {project} ({client}) catalog, you must accept the private viewing terms.

bullets.confidential: The information shown is confidential and property of VRYP ART & AI SOLUTIONS SPA.
bullets.noShare: Do not reproduce, distribute, or disclose this information to third parties.
bullets.ipExclusive: Digital talents are exclusive IP of the studio. The client acquires a license for the final pieces produced, not for the talent itself.
bullets.audit: This session is registered with timestamp and IP for legal traceability.
bullets.watermark: Images contain identifying watermarks with client name, date and talent code.
bullets.legal: Misuse has legal consequences under Chilean Law 19.628 and applicable regulations.

nda.checkbox: I have read and accept the private viewing terms.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: There was an error loading this project. The Yutro Estudio team has been notified. Try again or go back to the hub.

hub.title: Talent Admin
hub.subtitle: Manage the catalog, projects and incoming selections.
